summary: This is a brief blog post that links to O'Neil's Bloomberg View column comparing Trump's cognitive style to Google's ad testing methodology. The post itself contains no substantive analysis, serving only as a pointer to external content. The intriguing title suggests the column explores how Trump's thinking resembles path-independent algorithmic processes, where outcomes don't depend on the sequence of inputs.
key_points: Post is a link announcement to Bloomberg View column
Draws parallel between Trump's cognition and Google ad testing
money_quotes: Donald Trump's Path-Independent Theory of Mind: How the U.S. president is like a Google ad test
key_insight: The post merely promotes external content comparing Trump's mental processes to algorithmic A/B testing, with no substantive analysis in the post itself.
